report_name: INC_RANSOM Hits Indian Agro-Tech Firm GSP Crop Science in Ransomware Attack

threat_actors.name: INC Ransom
threat_actors.description: A financially-motivated ransomware group that conducted a double-extortion attack against GSP Crop Science Limited. The group exfiltrates sensitive data before deploying their ransomware payload to maximize pressure on the victim.
threat_actors.goals: Financial gain through double-extortion ransomware attacks.

attack_patterns.name: Valid Accounts
attack_patterns.description: Used for initial access, likely through stolen RDP or VPN credentials purchased on the dark web.

attack_patterns.name: Kerberoasting
attack_patterns.description: Used to escalate privileges to Domain Admin by stealing Kerberos service account credentials.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration to Cloud Storage
attack_patterns.description: Used to exfiltrate large volumes of sensitive data to a cloud storage provider like MEGA before encryption as part of a double-extortion tactic.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: The final stage of the attack where the INC Ransom payload is deployed to encrypt files on servers and workstations, causing operational disruption.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: Attackers delete Volume Shadow Copies using vssadmin.exe to prevent easy recovery from encrypted files.

attack_patterns.name: Ingress Tool Transfer
attack_patterns.description: PowerShell was used to download and execute payloads from the internet during the attack.

attack_patterns.name: PowerShell
attack_patterns.description: Used as a command and scripting interpreter to download and execute malicious payloads.

malware.name: INC Ransom
malware.description: Ransomware used by the INC Ransom group. It encrypts files, appends the .inc_ransom extension, and is used as part of a double-extortion scheme.

tools.name: vssadmin
tools.description: Used by the attackers to delete Volume Shadow Copies to inhibit system recovery before deploying the ransomware.

identities.name: GSP Crop Science Limited
identities.description: An Indian agricultural technology and agrochemical manufacturing company targeted by the INC Ransom group in a double-extortion ransomware attack.

infrastructure.name: INC Ransom Exfiltration Server
infrastructure.description: Cloud storage provider servers, such as MEGA, used by INC Ransom to exfiltrate victim data before encryption.

indicators.name: INC Ransom - PowerShell Download and Execute
indicators.pattern:
title: INC Ransom - PowerShell Download and Execute
id: 2b1c8d3e-4f5a-4b6c-8d9e-0f1a2b3c4d5e
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of PowerShell to download and execute payloads from the internet, a technique commonly used by INC Ransom.
references:
  - https://www.breachsense.com/breaches/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-27
tags:
  - attack.t1105
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.execution
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\powershell.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'New-Object'
      - 'Net.WebClient'
      - 'DownloadString'
      - 'IEX'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the use of PowerShell to download and execute payloads from the internet, a technique commonly used by INC Ransom for initial access and lateral movement.

indicators.name: INC Ransom - VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: INC Ransom - VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
id: 9e8f7a6b-5c4d-4e3f-8a9b-0c1d2e3f4a5b
status: experimental
description: Detects the deletion of Volume Shadow Copies using vssadmin.exe, a common precursor to ransomware deployment by groups like INC Ransom.
references:
  - https://www.breachsense.com/breaches/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-27
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.impact
level: critical
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the deletion of Volume Shadow Copies using vssadmin.exe, a hallmark of pre-ransomware activity to prevent easy recovery.

indicators.name: INC Ransom - Ransomware File Extension
indicators.pattern:
title: INC Ransom - Ransomware File Extension
id: 1a2b3c4d-5e6f-4a7b-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of files with the .inc_ransom extension, indicating that the INC Ransom payload has been executed and is encrypting files.
references:
  - https://www.breachsense.com/breaches/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-27
tags:
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.impact
level: critical
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.inc_ransom'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of files with the .inc_ransom extension, indicating active file encryption by INC Ransom.

indicators.name: Potential Kerberoasting Activity
indicators.pattern:
title: Potential Kerberoasting Activity
id: 7d6e5f4a-3b2c-4d1e-9f8a-7b6c5d4e3f2a
status: experimental
description: Detects a high volume of Kerberos service ticket requests (Event ID 4769), which can be indicative of Kerberoasting attacks used for privilege escalation.
references:
  - https://www.breachsense.com/breaches/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-27
tags:
  - attack.t1558.003
  - attack.credential_access
level: medium
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: security
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 4769
    TicketOptions: '0x40810000'
    TicketEncryptionType: '0x17'
  filter:
    AccountName|endswith: '$'
  condition: selection and not filter
indicators.description: Detects a high volume of Kerberos service ticket requests (Event ID 4769), which can be indicative of Kerberoasting attacks used for privilege escalation.

relationships.source_name: INC Ransom - PowerShell Download and Execute
INC Ransom - VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
